action.reasoning: Observation: New best test AUC 0.7583 (val peak 0.7595@ep10), steady improvement from embedded DKT tuning, clear overfitting post-peak but ES works, ~14min left (~12 iters at 60s). Analysis: Larger embed helped val AUC; further capacity (h=1024/e=384) + stronger reg (d=0.5/wd=2e-4/lower-lr=1e-4) + bs=64 should raise peak and reduce gen gap without OOM/time issues (params<<1B). Persistent truncation in workspace train.py risks bugs. Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files clean/complete (full hparam ckpt save, no deprecated args, grad clip, robust ES/scheduler, jsonl-only + key prints, arg parsing, exact inference), use tuned params, train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
